$comment: c41 D-CSUBSET-POINTER-INT-ARITHMETIC (C 6.5.6p8): p+n / n+p / p-n must scale by sizeof(*p). int* (stride 4) + struct Pair* (stride >=8); char* (stride 1) unaffected. RED-ON-DISABLE: revert the combineBinaryOp c41 Gep intercept -> 1-byte stride -> p+2 reads wrong slot -> return 1. Exit 42 iff all 7 sub-cases pass. The most pervasive flagged run-green miscompile (sqlite indexes pointers everywhere). Release pipeline + all 4 targets.
